questions.question: For 222 Rajpur, Dehradun, how many total residences are planned and over how many acres is the project spread?
questions.answer: There are 22 bespoke residences spread across 5 acres.

questions.question: At 222 Rajpur, what types of residences are available?
questions.answer: The available residences are townhouses, courtyard villas, and forest villas.

questions.question: Is 222 Rajpur adjacent to any forest area? If yes, which one?
questions.answer: Yes, it is adjacent to the Malsi Reserve Forest.

questions.question: What are the views offered from residences at 222 Rajpur, Dehradun?
questions.answer: The residences offer spectacular panoramic views of the Malsi Reserve Forest and the Mussoorie Hills.

questions.question: How far is Jolly Grant Airport from 222 Rajpur, Dehradun?
questions.answer: Jolly Grant Airport is 36.9 km away.

questions.question: What is the distance between 222 Rajpur and The Doon School?
questions.answer: The distance is 10.6 km.

questions.question: How long does it take to reach Pacific Mall from 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: It takes 8 minutes (3.8 km) to reach Pacific Mall.

questions.question: Is 222 Rajpur close to Max Super Specialty Hospital?
questions.answer: Yes, it has immediate access and is located only minutes away from the super-speciality Max Hospital.

questions.question: How many Townhouse units are available at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: There are 14 Townhouse units available.

questions.question: What is the built-up area and carpet area of a Townhouse at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: The built-up area is 3990 sq.ft. and the carpet area is 3047 sq.ft.

questions.question: Does the Townhouse at 222 Rajpur include a sky court?
questions.answer: Yes, it includes a stunning double height sky court covered with a double glazed premium skylight.

questions.question: What is the ceiling height in the Townhouse units at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: The Townhouse units have a generous ceiling height of 10.5 ft.

questions.question: How many parking spaces are provided with each Townhouse at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: There is provision for 2 car parking spaces within the premises.

questions.question: How many Courtyard Villas are available at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: There are 5 Courtyard Villas available.

questions.question: What is the plot size range for Courtyard Villas at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: The plot size ranges from 364 to 565 sq.m.

questions.question: Do the Courtyard Villas at 222 Rajpur include staff accommodation?
questions.answer: Yes, they include a staff bedroom and bathroom with a separate entry.

questions.question: What is the terrace size of a Courtyard Villa at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: The terrace area is 1171 sq.ft.

questions.question: How many Forest Villas are available at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: There are 3 Forest Villas available.

questions.question: What is the built-up area of a Forest Villa at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: The built-up area is 5757 sq.ft.

questions.question: Do Forest Villas at 222 Rajpur have private elevators?
questions.answer: Yes, they feature a private elevator for ease of movement.

questions.question: What special landscape feature is included in the lower ground floor of Forest Villas at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: The lower ground floor includes a terraced garden.

questions.question: Does 222 Rajpur provide round-the-clock security?
questions.answer: Yes, it provides round-the-clock security with 24x7 monitoring by security agents, CCTV cameras, and an RFID-based security system.

questions.question: What wellness or nature-focused amenities are offered at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: Amenities include terraced community gardens, a private lychee orchard, pedestrian walkways, and a forest view pavilion.

questions.question: Does 222 Rajpur offer power backup and uninterrupted water supply?
questions.answer: Yes, it offers 100% power backup and uninterrupted water supply.

questions.question: Is there a private orchard at 222 Rajpur?
questions.answer: Yes, there is a private lychee orchard.

questions.question: What is the total super built-up area of Max House, Okhla?
questions.answer: The total super built-up area is 105,425 sq. ft.

questions.question: How many tenant floors are there in Max House?
questions.answer: There are 8 tenant floors.

questions.question: What is the typical floor plate size at Max House?
questions.answer: The typical floor plate size is 13,000 sq. ft.

questions.question: What is the green rating of Max House?
questions.answer: The building has a LEED Gold green rating.

questions.question: How far is Max House, Okhla from the Okhla NSIC Metro Station?
questions.answer: It is within walking distance, approximately 3 km or a 5-minute drive.

questions.question: How far is Max House from IGI Airport?
questions.answer: IGI Airport is 20 km away, which takes about 38 minutes.

questions.question: Is Max House within walking distance of a metro station?
questions.answer: Yes, it is strategically located within walking distance of the Okhla NSIC Metro Station and the Kalkaji Interconnect.

questions.question: What façade material is used in Max House?
questions.answer: The unique façade is made of terracotta bricks.

questions.question: What is the floor-to-ceiling height at Max House?
questions.answer: The building features high ceilings with a height of 3.75 meters.

questions.question: Does Max House use double-glazed windows?
questions.answer: Yes, it uses double-glazed windows to lower operating costs while allowing light transmission.

questions.question: What air treatment technology is used in Max House?
questions.answer: It uses a three-tier air treatment technology complete with CO2 sensors and MERV 8 & MERV 13 filters.

questions.question: Is Max House LEED certified?
questions.answer: Yes, it is designed to be LEED Gold certified.

questions.question: Does Max House incorporate biophilic design principles?
questions.answer: Yes, it incorporates biophilia features to optimize cognitive and emotional health, creativity, and wellness.

questions.question: What is the total super built-up area of Max Towers, Noida?
questions.answer: The total super built-up area is 52,016 square metres (559,891 square feet).

questions.question: How many office floors and amenity floors are there in Max Towers?
questions.answer: There are 19 office floors and 4 amenity floors.

questions.question: What is the typical floor plate size at Max Towers?
questions.answer: The typical office floor plate size is 2,369 square metres (25,500 square feet).

questions.question: What is the floor-to-floor height at Max Towers?
questions.answer: The floor-to-floor height is a minimum of 4.3 metres for all office floors.

questions.question: What green rating has Max Towers achieved?
questions.answer: Max Towers has achieved a LEED Platinum green rating.

questions.question: Does Max Towers offer on-site wastewater treatment?
questions.answer: Yes, it offers on-site treatment of 100% waste water.

questions.question: What is the coefficient of performance (COP) of the chiller system at Max Towers?
questions.answer: The chiller system delivers a 6.2 coefficient of performance.

questions.question: Does Max Towers support electric vehicle parking?
questions.answer: Yes, the parking is electric vehicle and carpool friendly.

questions.question: Does Max Towers have a swimming pool?
questions.answer: Yes, it features an indoor temperature-controlled swimming pool.

questions.question: What kind of fitness facilities are available at Max Towers?
questions.answer: It offers a state-of-the-art fitness centre with best-in-class trainers, in-house sports leagues, and a swimming pool.

questions.question: Does Max Towers provide daycare facilities?
questions.answer: Yes, it provides daycare facilities along with chiropractor services.

questions.question: What air treatment system is used in Max Towers?
questions.answer: It uses a 3-tier clean air treatment technology on par with global standards, coupled with CO2 sensors.

questions.question: Where is Max Towers located?
questions.answer: It is located in Sector 16B, Noida, at the epicentre of the Delhi One mixed-use luxury development on the edge of South Delhi.

questions.question: Is Max Towers within walking distance of a metro station?
questions.answer: Yes, it is within walking distance (0.7 km or 5 mins) from the Sector 16 Metro Station.

questions.question: Does Max Towers have direct access to the DND Flyway?
questions.answer: Yes, it commands direct access and has large frontage on the north side of the DND Flyway.

questions.question: What type of façade glass is used in Max Towers?
questions.answer: It uses Low-E, high performance insulated glass units with low reflectance.

questions.question: What is the solar heat gain coefficient of the façade at Max Towers?
questions.answer: The solar heat gain coefficient of the façade is 0.25.

questions.question: What percentage of regular occupied space at Max Towers gets line-of-sight to the outside?
questions.answer: 90% of regular occupied space gets direct line-of-sight to the outside environment.

questions.answer: 222 Rajpur is the purely residential property.

questions.answer: Max Towers has a higher certification (LEED Platinum) compared to Max House (LEED Gold).

questions.answer: Max Towers has a significantly larger total super built-up area (559,891 sq. ft.) compared to Max House (105,425 sq. ft.).

questions.answer: Max Towers has more tenant floors (19 office floors) compared to Max House (8 tenant floors).

questions.question: Which property is closer to a metro station: Max House or Max Towers?
questions.answer: Both properties are located within walking distance of a metro station (Max Towers is 0.7 km away, and Max House is walking distance to Okhla NSIC).

questions.question: Does 222 Rajpur offer wellness amenities comparable to Max Towers?
questions.answer: Both offer wellness amenities, but of different types. 222 Rajpur focuses on nature-based wellness (orchards, forest pavilions), while Max Towers provides active facilities (fitness centre, swimming pool, chiropractor).

questions.answer: For 222 Rajpur, the project is spread over 5 acres. Max Towers has a total super built-up area of 559,891 sq. ft. Max House has a total super built-up area of 105,425 sq. ft.

questions.answer: Max Towers has 19 office floors and 4 amenity floors. Max House has 8 tenant floors. 222 Rajpur consists of individual villas and townhouses.
